questions.q: Whereabouts is the practice? I need the street address.
What's the postcode? I want to look up the route on Maps.
What number should I call to speak to someone at the practice?
Do you have an email address I can use to get in touch?
What days and times are you open?
What time do you close on a Thursday evening?
I can only make it first thing — what's your earliest opening time during the week?
Do you open at the same time every morning or does it vary?
What's the latest I could get an appointment on a Friday?
If I need an after-work slot, which day stays open the latest?
Are you currently taking on new patients?
I've never been to you before — how do I get registered and book my first visit?
How much will my very first appointment cost?
What actually happens at a new patient appointment — what do I get for my money?
I'm already a patient — how much is my next routine check-up?
Do you offer hygienist appointments?
How much does a standard scale and polish with the hygienist cost?
I've got a lot of surface staining from coffee — can the hygienist sort that, and how much would it be?
Can you whiten my teeth professionally?
I want a brighter smile — what does teeth whitening cost?
Do you do composite bonding for chipped teeth, and what does it cost?
Are porcelain veneers something you offer here? Roughly how much are they?
Can you straighten my teeth without fixed metal braces?
How much does Invisalign treatment cost at your practice?
Is there a cheaper aligner option for mild crowding rather than full Invisalign?
I've lost a tooth — do you do dental implants?
What's the cost for a single dental implant?
I've been told I might need root canal treatment — is that something you do?
Can I get a crown made and fitted all in the same appointment?
How much does it cost to have a tooth taken out?
Can I spread the cost of treatment rather than paying everything at once?
Do you have a monthly plan that covers my check-ups and hygienist visits?
What's included in the monthly practice plan and what does it cost each month?
Who is the owner or principal dentist at the practice?
Which dentists work at Leeds City Dentalcare?
I'm really nervous at the dentist and have been putting off going — can you help with that?
If I need to cancel my appointment last minute, is there a charge?
How long has the practice been operating?
Do you offer NHS dental treatment?
Is there parking available at or near the practice?
Are you open on Saturdays or Sundays at all?
Do you offer conscious sedation or any kind of sleep dentistry for very nervous patients?
Can you tell me the name of the dental hygienist who works there?
What time do you close on Tuesday evenings?
Do you take X-rays and what do they cost?
I've got a cavity in a back tooth — what filling options are there and how much?
Can I get a white tooth-coloured filling for a front tooth, and what does it cost?
I have a large cavity — what would a big filling set me back?
How much is an Emax all-ceramic crown at your practice?
What does a zirconia crown cost?
How much is a porcelain alloy crown?
Do you provide dentures and what styles are available?
What would a complete set of upper and lower dentures cost me?
I only need one arch replacing — how much for a single full denture?
What's a Valplast denture and what does it cost?
Is there a consultation fee before starting orthodontic treatment, and does it come off the final bill?
What's the upgraded monthly plan with more hygienist visits and how much is it?
How many hygienist visits a year does the basic monthly plan include?
Can I see the hygienist without being referred by a dentist first?
If I have Airflow stain removal done at the same time as a scale and polish, what would that cost together?
What implant brand do you use for dental implant treatment?
Can you do a bone graft if I don't have enough jaw bone for an implant?
Who is Dr Ehim Akinlade — is he one of the dentists there?
Is there a dentist called Dr Croston at the practice?
What payment methods do you accept — can I pay by card?
Will you give me a cost estimate before you start any work?
Do I pay at the end of each appointment or do you invoice me later?
must_include: payment on the day of treatment

questions.q: Are your dentists regulated by the General Dental Council?
Whereabouts in Leeds are you — are you near the city centre?
Do you offer Six-Month Smiles or Fast-Braces for quicker teeth straightening?
Do you treat children as well as adults?
Is your focus more on preventing problems or fixing them once they happen?
What kind of building is the practice in — is it part of a bigger block or a standalone place?
Do you have an Instagram page where I can see examples of your work?
What smile makeover or cosmetic treatments do you offer?
Do you have emergency out-of-hours appointments if I'm in severe pain at night or over a bank holiday?
What is the practice manager's name?
Are you registered with the Care Quality Commission?
How much do you charge for a missed appointment?
Is the practice wheelchair accessible?
Do you have an onsite dental laboratory?
Can I get an itemised receipt for claiming back costs through my private dental insurance?
Do you offer digital smile design software so I can preview results before committing to treatment?
